allow: Bash(node -e "const lucide = require\(''lucide-react''\); console.log\(''GraduationCap:'', !!lucide.GraduationCap\); console.log\(''Code2:'', !!lucide.Code2\); console.log\(''Brain:'', !!lucide.Brain\); console.log\(''Rocket:'', !!lucide.Rocket\);")
